rationale: Review 2's blocking finding misidentifies which argument of Bialgebra.TensorProduct.map covers which tensor factor: given the variable block [Bialgebra S A] [Bialgebra R B], the first argument maps the S-factor (K) and the second maps the R-factor (A), so (BialgHom.id K K) f is correct; swapping as Review 2 demands would break the implementation. Review 1's clean approve is correct.
